scripts.build: apps/web/node_modules/.bin/tsc -b apps/web/tsconfig.json && apps/web/node_modules/.bin/vite build apps/web --config apps/web/vite.config.ts
scripts.verify: apps/web/node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p apps/web/tsconfig.json && apps/web/node_modules/.bin/vitest run --root apps/web && apps/web/node_modules/.bin/tsc -b apps/web/tsconfig.json && apps/web/node_modules/.bin/vite build apps/web --config apps/web/vite.config.ts && node scripts/test-contracts.mjs
